title: Damienne's Bits 'n' Bobs
description: A Vanilla+ mod designed to fill in the gaps left by some other decoration mods. All sorts of new decor to try out, ranging from new Amethyst blocks to even a new Warped Wart crop!
body:
Damienne's Bits 'n' Bobs is a mod adding a bunch of small things. Mainly in the form of new building blocks, but also including some other new features.

As of v0.1, features include:


<details>
<summary>Roses</summary>

A familiar-yet-new flower, obtainable by trimming a Rose Bush in a Stonecutter.
![A rose bush being split into roses at a Stonecutter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63b805df3bde56ecf48ca6196784b44ef071ea2b.png)

Also available in several variants through dyeing, and craftable into beautiful rose bouquets!
![Various Roses and their associated Bouquets.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1995a323fbb7d57a12cea16c443c1244c747ac5d.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Gilded Quartz</summary>

![Gilded Quartz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed732078e4aa2c0ff06ee39fcafae000d9951700.png)

A new variant of Quartz with connected textures. Check Gilded Deepslate's description for further details.

</details>


<details>
<summary>New Mud Blocks</summary>

A variety of new Mud Blocks have been added!
![A small structure showcasing Mossy Mud Bricks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44f556380482fe056af03dac6c322e4a0d72d588.png)
For one, we have Mossy Mud Bricks, something that I'm shocked wasnt a vanilla feature! It just makes sense!
![A small, wall-like structure showcasing Polished Mud](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89da86971363a374d5b6d5eabe43a74d81261ddf.png)
Next, we have Polished Mud, also available in a pillar form!
![Chiseled Mud Bricks with a pig face. Oink oink!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2a202626ce020bf665dd466426a8846d0b4b968.png)
Last but not least, we have Chiseled Mud Bricks, featuring the face of a pig! How adorable!

</details>


<details>
<summary>Stained Clay</summary>

Ever wished Minecraft had more pastel colors to work into your palette? Look no further than Stained Clay, a new set of colorful blocks!
![All 16 color variants of Stained Clay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90d84fdaa115da87e872cb05f3cf7328aa197d5d.png)
Some ideas where these colors work great include:
combining Brown Stained Clay with Mud Bricks!
![Brown Stained Clay blending in smoothly alongside Mud blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58618b68ca6fc73588a94060fd652b7278276344.png)
combining Black Stained Clay with Mud to add texture!
![Black Stained Clay blending amongst some mud blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15ac70ecf8374bf26003775ece1a8520bba6a319.png)
And much more!

</details>

(v0.0 Features)

<details>
<summary>Warped Wart</summary>

The inital focus of Bits 'n' Bobs, Warped Wart! We've all seen Warped Wart blocks on Warped Fungus trees, and wondered, what if we had that as a plant? That's what this is!

![The three growth stages of Warped Wart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46727c259ee6bb25b3816b3ad64e7e40f9899f5e.png)

While not quite as useful as Nether Wart, this new plant can be used to craft a new block palette, **Blue Nether Bricks!**

![The many variants of Blue Nether Bricks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f089ea922a3a324504cc12f925e958e20b3cdf01.png)

Also, just for consistency, this adds Chiseled Red Nether Bricks.

![Chiseled Red Nether Bricks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9705ee34e18133e9473095ea2bc147bc6bc73041.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Gilded Deepslate</summary>

Gilded Deepslate is a new variant of deepslate, coming in many types, with a connected texture forming an outline of a given material. Currently, these blocks exist in all vanilla armor trim materials.

![A showcase of all the Gilded Deepslate textures.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/129fe8d1cbc1635ddd8e0872ce30d23416b6190b.png)

Also, crafting Netherite Gilded Deepslate gives a new advancement:
![The advancement for crafting Netherite Gilded Deepslate, titled "Weird Flex But Okay"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7b5ed765df4369c71f83410472c4c00b87861b9.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>The Amethyst Block Palette</summary>

Amethyst Blocks have been given many new decorative variants, great for building with! 

![A showcase of the various new Amethyst blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdc12fb455f0546f301b82356a2675523ce5399a.png)

Ranging from cut, to tiles, to bricks, to polished, to even amethyst pillars, you'll never be short of options to build with! Also, some of these blocks have connected textures (Trimmed Amethyst and Amethyst Pillars), which can make for some cool patterns!

</details>


<details>
<summary>Sanded Copper</summary>

Pretty self explanatory, this is just a smoother variant of copper.

![Showcase of all 4 levels of oxidation that Sanded Copper has.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/262ffbcbad7068c22da695fdbf2aedffca11b7fb.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Woven Wool</summary>

A new variant of wool, with a nice and wavy texture! Also available as carpets!

![Woven Wool and carpets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/323a251062bdd1d37727997a841ef0801ee6d01a.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Polished Tiles</summary>

A new decorative block, great for kitchens! Or if you wanna recreate Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria, I guess.

![Polished Tiles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/654a820df31c14fc2026c2565666219938e12fbf.png)

</details>



<details>
<summary>⚠️ INCOMPLETE FEATURES!! ⚠️</summary>

This mod is still a work-in-progress, so some features exist but aren't used! The main notable examples as of right now are **Purified** and **Refined Corruption**. While accessible in Creative mode, these blocks are entirely unobtainable in survival as of right now while I try to think of a balanced way to implement them. Stay tuned!! 

</details>
